candidate_policy.name: v2.1_review_candidate_not_adopted
candidate_policy.rationale: H-G1 signal is exposure-weighted; row-rate alone can overweight low-notional rows, but notional coverage cannot excuse a material uncovered bucket.

conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้

forbidden_actions: Do not claim H-G1 coverage pass.
Do not use NOVI/net-gamma as a strategy filter.
Do not buy replacement OI before a v3 manifest validates.
Do not edit policy v2 to make the current 10-date set pass silently.
decision.recommended_next_step: Draft policy v2.1 as a review artifact and create a manifest v3 replacement plan for the below-floor bucket before any new paid OI pull.
decision.why: Four failures look like row-rate policy strictness, but 2023-07-12 otm_put keeps only 0.662545 computed OI-notional coverage; relaxing the policy alone would hide a material uncovered bucket.

tier_blockers: No true dealer-side gamma inventory data
